children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, generate unique patient_id
children.behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present and non-empty; generate a new patient_id; store patient data in patients database; return success with patient_id

global_vars.description: Write new patient record to patients database

data_operations.description: Create new patient record with generated patient_id

constraints.description: patient_data must contain name, dob, contact, insurance fields

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created in patients database with unique patient_id

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
children.behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients; check doctor availability at requested time (no conflict); create appointment record with status 'confirmed'; generate confirmation message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence
Read existing appointments for availability check; write new appointment record

data_operations.description: Verify patient_id exists in patients database
Check for conflicting appointments at requested time
Create new appointment record with status 'confirmed'

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database
No existing appointment for same doctor at same time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record is created in appointments database with no time conflicts

children.name: RetrieveMedicalRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
children.behavior: Query records database for all records with given patient_id; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

global_vars.description: Read medical records for the patient

data_operations.description: Retrieve all records for given patient_id, sorted by timestamp descending

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database

acceptance_criteria.description: Records are returned sorted by date descending

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.purpose: Update patient profile fields; if insurance changed, validate against external system
children.behavior: Update provided fields in patient record; if insurance field is present and different from current, call external validation; return success with updated data

global_vars.description: Read current patient record; write updated fields

data_operations.description: Read current patient record to compare insurance field
Update patient record with new field values

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database
If insurance field changed, must call ValidateInsuranceExternal

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is updated in patients database with validated insurance if changed

children.name: ValidateInsuranceExternal
children.purpose: Validate insurance information against external system
children.behavior: Send insurance data to external validation service; return validation result (valid/invalid)

constraints.description: External validation service must be reachable

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns boolean indicating insurance validity from external system

governance_notes: Parent global vars conservation verified: patients (read_write) covered by RegisterPatient (write), BookAppointment (read), UpdatePatientProfile (read_write). appointments (read_write) covered by BookAppointment (read_write). records (read_write) covered by RetrieveMedicalRecords (read). No parent operation is dropped.
